global_description: Large, robust mammal with a broad, muscular body, typically covered in short hair. Colors vary from black, brown, white, or a mix. Features a large head with prominent eyes and ears, a long tail with a tuft, and sturdy legs with hooves. Often has horns or a dewlap.

part_details.head: Large with prominent eyes, ears, and often horns
part_details.body: Broad and muscular, covered in short hair
part_details.tail: Long with a tuft at the end
part_details.horns: Curved or straight, present in some breeds
